conbody.p: The data model follows several key principles:

section.title: Simplicity
section.p: The model should remain easy to understand and implement.

section.title: Extensibility
section.p: New fields and capabilities should be added without breaking existing structures.

section.title: Retrieval Efficiency
section.p: The model should support fast lookup and scoring operations.

section.title: Separation of Concerns
section.p: Embedding storage, metadata, and content should remain logically distinct.

section.title: Alignment with Retrieval Pipeline
section.p: The data model should directly support the needs of the retrieval and ranking system.
